summary: Hyunwoo accepts an Imperial quest from the Emperor that requires him to achieve 100 consecutive wins in the Colosseum to prove his worth. While preparing for his upcoming debut stream, he powers up his pet bear, Tangy, with a rare essence and acquires new skills and equipment, including his old 'MeleeGod' armor sent by Kale. As hype builds around his challenge, Hyunwoo sets his sights on reclaiming his top ranking in the Colosseum.
key_moments: The Emperor tasks Hyunwoo with achieving 100 consecutive wins in the Colosseum to prove his qualifications.
Hyunwoo uses a rare essence to evolve his pet bear Tangy, granting it new magic skills.
Hyunwoo receives his old 'Black Jaguar' gear from Kale and prepares to stream his Colosseum climb.
